payload.answer: PPO-002, which was entropy tuned, achieved a reward of 0.18 and a Sharpe ratio of 0.51. This is an improvement over the baseline PPO-001, which had a reward of 0.12 and a Sharpe ratio of 0.45.
payload.decision: Compare the performance metrics of PPO-001 and PPO-002 to identify improvements.

entity_resolution.reason: No entity resolution required as all entities are distinct and clearly defined within the context.

payload.intent: Evaluate the performance of different PPO runs based on reward and Sharpe ratio.

memory_cards.statement: PPO-001 is a baseline run with a reward of 0.12 and a Sharpe ratio of 0.45.
PPO-002 is an entropy-tuned run with a reward of 0.18 and a Sharpe ratio of 0.51.
PPO-002 achieved a higher reward (0.18) and Sharpe ratio (0.51) compared to PPO-001 (reward 0.12, Sharpe 0.45).
